subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from God unto His servant, who was named Haydar before 'Alí, that he might receive the breezes of the Command from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الله الی عبده الذی سمی بحیدر قبل علی لیاخذه نفحات الامر من
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action
